name: resolver-d1-push-channel-fires
description: ADR 0037 Phase V Wave 5 invariant — `onSettingsChange` push channel fires on every resolved-state mutation. The hook-side counter (`__canaryGetSettingsChangeCount`) installs the subscription on first read; the test takes a baseline, calls setPerfSettings N times, then asserts the delta is exactly N. Validates that subscribers (NodeCardLayer + future consumers) reliably see every write instead of polling.

commands: (async () => { window.__canaryApplyProfile('standard'); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 400)); const c0 = window.__canaryGetSettingsChangeCount().value; window.__canarySetPerfSettings({ bloomStrength: 1.1 }); window.__canarySetPerfSettings({ bloomStrength: 1.2 }); window.__canarySetPerfSettings({ bloomStrength: 1.3 }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 200)); const c1 = window.__canaryGetSettingsChangeCount().value; const delta = c1 - c0; if (delta < 3) throw new Error('expected at least 3 push-channel fires for 3 setPerfSettings calls, got delta=' + delta + ' (c0=' + c0 + ' c1=' + c1 + ')'); return 'D1 pass: push channel fired delta=' + delta + ' for 3 setPerfSettings calls (subscriber-fired model holds)'; })()
